A1_shadow.name: Relax displacement_blocked
tail_risk_notes: Relaxing displacement may increase drawdown; capacity unchanged.

A3_shadow.name: Lower expectancy score floor (shadow only)
tail_risk_notes: Admitting more low-score trades may increase loss concentration; monitor worst-N if promoted to live.

B1_shadow.name: Extend minimum hold +15 min
tail_risk_notes: Extending min hold may increase drawdown in fast reversals.

B2_shadow.name: Remove early signal_decay exits
tail_risk_notes: Removing early decay may hold losers longer.

C2_shadow.name: Good vetoes vs missed winners
tail_risk_notes: Full C2 requires estimate_blocked_outcome per block; this is proxy by reason count * baseline avg PnL.

risk_flags.A3_shadow: Lower score floor may admit worse entries.
risk_flags.B1_shadow: Min hold extension may increase drawdown in fast reversals.
risk_flags.B2_shadow: Removing early signal_decay may hold losers longer.
risk_flags.C2_shadow: Full C2 requires per-block outcome; proxy only.

stability_notes: Signal consistency across time windows TBD; last-387 is governing cohort.

persona_verdicts.adversarial: SHADOW_COMPARISON_LAST387 ranks shadows by proxy delta. Recommend advancing B2_shadow only if shadow is least negative and tail-risk acceptable. Others: wait or discard.
persona_verdicts.quant: Ranking by expected improvement (proxy). Advance B2_shadow to live paper test; validate with backtest. Others hold until more data.
persona_verdicts.product_operator: Use comparison to pick ONE shadow for next live paper test: B2_shadow. Others wait for product prioritization.
persona_verdicts.risk: Risk flags per shadow in comparison. Advance only B2_shadow if risk signs off. Others hold or discard.
persona_verdicts.execution_sre: Advance B2_shadow only after SRE confirms rollback procedure. Others: hold.
